heroHeadline: Indonesia at 733: From Majapahit Empire to Prabowo's Republic
heroSubtitle: The world's fourth-most populous nation navigates democratic consolidation, a $32 billion capital relocation to Nusantara, Papua autonomy, and Prabowo Subianto's presidency — 733 years after Majapahit forged the concept of a unified Nusantara archipelago.
footerNote: Data sourced from Sekretariat Negara RI, BPS Statistics Indonesia, Komnas HAM, World Bank, UN Treaty Series, and verified academic historical sources.
